class.name: JWDebugDraw
class.brief_description: Immediate-mode debug drawing utility for 3D shapes, lines, and text.
class.description: [JWDebugDraw] provides a static, immediate-mode API for drawing debug shapes, lines, and text in 3D and 2D screen space. All methods are static and can be called from anywhere without an instance.

method.name: draw_arc
method.description: Draws an arc shape at [param position] in 3D space. The arc is aligned to [param axis] with the given [param radius], spanning from [param angle_start] to [param angle_end] in degrees.

method.name: draw_arrow
method.description: Draws an arrow from [param start] to [param end] in 3D space. [param head_radius] controls the radius of the arrowhead cone. [param head_length] controls the length of the arrowhead; pass [code]-1.0[/code] to use [code]head_radius * 2[/code] automatically.

method.name: draw_axis
method.description: Draws a 3-axis gizmo at [param transform] in 3D space. The X, Y, and Z axes are drawn as arrows in red, green, and blue respectively, scaled by [param size].

method.name: draw_box
method.description: Draws an axis-aligned box centered at [param position] with the given [param size] in 3D space.

method.name: draw_box_xform
method.description: Draws a box with the given [param transform] in 3D space. The transform's basis determines orientation and scale.

method.name: draw_capsule
method.description: Draws a capsule in 3D space with hemispherical caps centered at [param start] and [param end], with the given [param radius].

method.name: draw_capsule_xform
method.description: Draws a capsule with the given [param transform] in 3D space. The transform's Y axis defines the capsule's orientation; X scale defines the radius.

method.name: draw_circle
method.description: Draws a full circle at [param position] in 3D space, aligned to [param axis], with the given [param radius].

method.name: draw_circle_xform
method.description: Draws a circle with the given [param transform] in 3D space. The transform's Z axis is used as the normal; X scale defines the radius.

method.name: draw_cone
method.description: Draws a cone centered at [param position] in 3D space, with the given base [param radius] and [param height]. The cone points upward along the Y axis.

method.name: draw_cone_xform
method.description: Draws a cone with the given [param transform] in 3D space. The transform's Y axis defines the cone's orientation; X scale defines the base radius.

method.name: draw_curve
method.description: Draws a Catmull-Rom spline through the given [param points] in 3D space. [param tension] controls how tightly the curve follows the control points (0 = loose, 1 = tight). [param segments] controls how many line segments are used to approximate each span between consecutive points.

method.name: draw_cylinder
method.description: Draws a cylinder in 3D space with flat caps centered at [param start] and [param end], with the given [param radius].

method.name: draw_cylinder_arc
method.description: Draws a partial cylinder arc in 3D space between [param start] and [param end], with the given [param radius], spanning from [param angle_start] to [param angle_end] in degrees.

method.name: draw_cylinder_arc_xform
method.description: Draws a partial cylinder arc with the given [param transform] in 3D space, spanning from [param angle_start] to [param angle_end] in degrees.

method.name: draw_cylinder_xform
method.description: Draws a cylinder with the given [param transform] in 3D space. The transform's Y axis defines the cylinder's orientation; X scale defines the radius.

method.name: draw_frustum
method.description: Draws a frustum (tapered box) starting at [param position] in 3D space. [param size_start] and [param size_end] are the XY extents of the near and far faces; [param length] is the depth along the Z axis.

method.name: draw_frustum_xform
method.description: Draws a frustum (tapered box) with the given [param transform] in 3D space. [param size_start] and [param size_end] are the XY extents of the near and far faces, scaled by the transform.

method.name: draw_hemisphere
method.description: Draws a hemisphere at [param position] in 3D space with the given [param radius]. The open face points in the direction opposite [param up].

method.name: draw_line
method.description: Draws a line between [param start] and [param end] in 3D space.

method.name: draw_point
method.description: Draws a point at [param position] in 3D space. The point is rendered as a small filled sphere with the given visual [param size].

method.name: draw_pyramid
method.description: Draws a pyramid at [param position] in 3D space with a rectangular base of [param size] and the given [param height]. The apex points upward along the Y axis.

method.name: draw_pyramid_xform
method.description: Draws a pyramid with the given [param transform] in 3D space. The transform's Y axis defines the apex direction; scale determines the base size and height.

method.name: draw_ray
method.description: Draws a ray starting at [param origin] pointing in [param direction] in 3D space. Rendered as an arrow; the length of [param direction] determines the ray's length.

method.name: draw_sphere
method.description: Draws a sphere at [param position] in 3D space with the given [param radius].

method.name: draw_sphere_arc
method.description: Draws a partial sphere arc at [param position] in 3D space with the given [param radius], spanning from [param angle_start] to [param angle_end] in degrees.

method.name: draw_sphere_arc_xform
method.description: Draws a partial sphere arc with the given [param transform] in 3D space, spanning from [param angle_start] to [param angle_end] in degrees. X scale of the transform defines the radius.

method.name: draw_sphere_xform
method.description: Draws a sphere with the given [param transform] in 3D space. X scale of the transform defines the radius.

method.name: draw_tapered_capsule
method.description: Draws a tapered capsule in 3D space with hemispherical caps at [param start] and [param end], where each cap has an independent radius defined by [param radius_start] and [param radius_end].

method.name: draw_tapered_capsule_xform
method.description: Draws a tapered capsule with the given [param transform] in 3D space. [param radius_start] and [param radius_end] are scaled by the transform's X scale.

method.name: draw_tapered_cylinder
method.description: Draws a tapered cylinder in 3D space between [param start] and [param end], where each end has an independent radius defined by [param radius_start] and [param radius_end].

method.name: draw_tapered_cylinder_xform
method.description: Draws a tapered cylinder with the given [param transform] in 3D space. [param radius_start] and [param radius_end] are scaled by the transform's X scale.

method.name: draw_text
method.description: Draws [param text] at [param position] in 3D world space. The text is projected onto the screen and scales with distance. Pass a non-transparent [param outline_color] to draw a text outline, or a non-transparent [param background_color] to draw a filled background rectangle behind the text.

method.name: draw_text_2d
method.description: Draws [param text] at a 2D screen-space [param position] in pixels. Use [constant TextFlags.TEXT_RELATIVE] to treat [param position] as a normalized [code](0..1, 0..1)[/code] fraction of the viewport size instead.

method.name: draw_text_xform
method.description: Draws [param text] at the origin of [param transform] in 3D world space. Unlike [method draw_text], the text is oriented and scaled according to the transform's basis, allowing it to appear as a billboard attached to a surface.

method.name: draw_triangle
method.description: Draws a triangle with vertices at [param vertex_a], [param vertex_b], and [param vertex_c] in 3D space.

constants.constant: Text is drawn at a fixed pixel size regardless of distance from the camera.
For [method draw_text_2d]: treat the position as a normalized [code](0..1, 0..1)[/code] fraction of the viewport size rather than pixel coordinates.
Append this text to the previous text entry at the same position rather than creating a new entry. Useful for building multi-line debug labels across multiple calls.
No draw flags. Renders as a wireframe outline with default settings.
Render the shape as a solid filled volume in addition to its outline.
Render the back faces of the shape with a reduced alpha, making occluded geometry visible through solid objects.
Render only the outer silhouette edge of the shape, hiding interior lines.
Scale the shape so it maintains a constant screen-space size regardless of distance from the camera. Used internally by [method draw_point].
